text: I feel a certain excitement standing here. The environment is clean and modern, with light that seems almost clinical. In the first space, everything is orderly, almost tranquil, like the anticipation before an idea takes form. Moving into the colorful, information-filled exhibit, my curiosity sharpens. I sense the presence of innovation and inquiry, and being surrounded by these creative energies makes me feel eager to engage, to learn, and maybe—just maybe—to discover something unexpected about technology and humanity.
